team.name: Elena Rostova
team.bio: Elena has spent over 15 years guiding visual narratives for world-class luxury brands. She believes that visual design is not just a coat of paint, but a fundamental pillar of user experience and brand integrity.
team.specialty: Creative Direction, Design System Strategy, Luxury Branding

team.name: Marcus Chen
team.bio: Marcus is a full-stack engineer specializing in sub-millisecond data pipelines and headless architecture. Prior to Lumina, he scaled web platforms for key financial corporations in Silicon Valley.
team.specialty: Next.js Engine Optimization, Canvas Pipelines, GraphQL Specs

team.name: Jordan Vance
team.bio: Jordan focuses on the micro-interactions that make interfaces feel responsive and alive. With background in cognitive sciences and visual arts, they design layouts that reduce cognitive load and delight users.

team.name: David Alistair
team.bio: David turns search query metrics into operational acquisition funnels. He combines rigorous technical site auditing with rich semantic strategy to build organic visibility that sustains year-over-year growth.
team.specialty: Technical Site Audits, Keyword Strategies, Structured Schema Implementation

team.name: Sarah Jenkins
team.bio: Sarah aligns product positioning with high-performance digital campaigns. She coordinates paid media and automated funnel campaigns that convert visitors into active institutional partners.
team.specialty: Paid Advertising (PPC) Funnels, Lifecycle Automation, Campaign ROI Optimization

team.name: Ferdous
team.bio: Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer Software Engineer vSoftware Engineer

hero.title: Crafting Premium Glassmorphic Experiences
hero.subtitle: We engineer high-end digital experiences that sit at the intersection of stunning aesthetics and enterprise-level reliability.

services.title: Our Core Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solutions built to drive enterprise growth.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What our clients say about us

reviews.author: Sarah Jenkins
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning work. The design exceeded all our expectations.

reviews.author: Marcus Lee
reviews.text: The performance is incredible. Our conversion rate increased by 40%.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to scale your digital presence?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Get in touch with our experts today and start your journey.

hero.title: Architects of the Digital Frontier
hero.subtitle: We are a team of engineers, designers, and thinkers dedicated to visual excellence.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded in 2024, Lumina was born from a desire to combine luxury visual design with ultra-fast web infrastructure. We believe that software should be both a utility and a work of art.

items.title: Precision
items.desc: Every pixel and line of code is written with absolute intent.

items.title: Aesthetics
items.desc: Stunning visuals that leave a lasting impression of quality.

items.title: Performance
items.desc: Optimized execution times for sub-millisecond response.

hero.title: Lumina Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solutions engineered for modern enterprises. We craft precision-driven experiences that elevate your brand.

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: Immersive, user-centric interfaces designed with pixel-perfect precision and functional luxury.

items.title: Web Engineering
items.desc: Robust, scalable, and high-performance digital architectures built on modern technology stacks.

items.title: SEO & Growth
items.desc: Data-driven search engine optimization to maximize your organic visibility and drive targeted traffic.

items.title: Digital Marketing
items.desc: Strategic campaigns that engage your audience and drive measurable conversions across channels.

items.title: AI & ML Consulting
items.desc:
Transforming operations with advanced models.
- Large Language Model tuning
- Predictive modeling
- Intelligent automation

hero.title: Featured Work
hero.subtitle: A curated collection of design systems, web platforms, and brand strategies crafted for industry leaders.

hero.title: Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Simple, value-driven plans customized to fit your growth stage.

items.name: Startup Core
items.desc: Perfect for emerging brands needing a high-performance landing page.

items.name: Enterprise Growth
items.desc: Complete custom Next.js site, CMS integration, and SEO launch.

items.name: Enterprise Ultimate
items.desc:
Ultimate package for global enterprises.
- Dedicated Solutions Architect
- 24/7 Priority SLA Response
- Unlimited Custom Integrations
- Standard AI Assistant Suite

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's build something extraordinary together.

form.title: Project Inquiry
form.subtitle: Tell us about your objectives and budget.

hero.title: Digital Insights
hero.subtitle: Articles and thoughts on design systems, web performance, and search visibility.
